title: Swap 3 car commutes for bike or transit
Shift 4 weekly meals to plant-forward
why_it_works: Dietary changes can produce meaningful annual reductions.

title: Cut home electricity by 15%
why_it_works: Lighting, appliance, and thermostat improvements compound over time.

title: Replace one short flight with rail or virtual
Adopt default low-waste shopping list
why_it_works: Avoids packaging and unnecessary consumer emissions.

title: Join local repair or reuse groups
why_it_works: Extends product lifespans and avoids replacement emissions.

title: Switch to green power or community solar
why_it_works: Cleaner electricity significantly cuts household footprint.
